channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1847] sanityn test 16 fail when run ofd+ldiskfs
item.description:
When run with USE_OFD=yes

11:34:33:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanityn test 16: 2500 iterations of dual-mount fsx =================== 11:34:31 (1346870071)
11:34:44:invalid opcode: 0000 1 SMP
11:34:44:last sysfs file: /sys/module/lockd/initstate
11:34:44:CPU 0
11:34:44:Modules linked in: nfs fscache osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]
11:34:44:
11:34:44:Pid: 5602, comm: ll_ost_io00_002 Not tainted 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.g293c36b.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
11:34:44:RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffa0d14003>] [<ffffffffa0d14003>] ldiskfs_count_free_inodes+0x43/0x70 [ldiskfs]
11:34:44:RSP: 0018:ffff88004dd0b758 EFLAGS: 00010286
11:34:45:RAX: ffffea00010a6cb8 RBX: 000000000000000d RCX: ffffffffa02e9c90
11:34:45:RDX: 000000000000000d RSI: 00000000000001f3 RDI: ffff880054f96410

11:34:45:R13: ffff880054f96410 R14: ffff88005f565668 R15: ffff88005f561400

11:34:45:CS: 0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 000000008005003b
11:34:45:CR2: 00007fd24552e000 CR3: 0000000072aad000 CR4: 00000000000006f0
11:34:45:DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000
11:34:45:DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000ffff0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400

11:34:45: [<ffffffffa02e99b8>] ? fsfilt_map_nblocks+0xd8/0x100 [fsfilt_ldiskfs]

11:34:45: [<ffffffff8100c140>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20
11:34:45:Code: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 48 89 <c6> 4c 89 e7 e8 24 02 02 00 89 c0 49 01 c5 83 c3 01 44 39 f3 72

11:34:45:Linux version 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.g293c36b.x86_64 (jenkins@builder-1-sde1-el6-x8664.lab.whamcloud.com) (gcc version 4.4.6 20120305 (Red Hat 4.4.6-4) (GCC) ) #1 SMP Tue Aug 28 14:50:57 PDT 2012
11:34:45:Command line: ro root=UUID=b443ab76-442f-411d-a3ed-06ef60dc4076 rd_NO_LUKS rd_NO_LVM LANG=en_US.UTF-8 rd_NO_MD console=ttyS0,115200 SYSFONT=latarcyrheb-sun16 KEYBOARDTYPE=pc KEYTABLE=us rd_NO_DM irqpoll nr_cpus=1 reset_devices cgroup_disable=memory mce=off memmap=exactmap memmap=613K@4K memmap=131463K@49765K elfcorehdr=181228K memmap=4K$0K memmap=64K$960K memmap=12K$2097140K memmap=272K$4194032K
11:34:45:KERNEL supported cpus:
11:34:45: Intel GenuineIntel
item.summary: sanityn test 16 fail when run ofd+ldiskfs

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: OFD is running a long time already.
This could be related to LU-1883.

Minh, let's use USE_OFD label for all related bugs
It will be much easier to find them and distinguish from other master bugs
